title: Construction, Mining, and Forestry Machinery and Equipment Rental and Leasing

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 532412 ($9,501,833,933) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 532412 ($34,227,963,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand
Mobile Heavy Equipment Mechanics, Except Engines
First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers
Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists

n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $513,756 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532412); class <5: 1,332 firms, avg revenue/firm $826,564 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $247,969 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 407 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,585,096 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $775,529 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 338 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,034,337 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,510,301 -> IN $1-10M band; class 20-99: 345 firms, avg revenue/firm $13,950,728 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $4,185,218 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 96 firms, avg revenue/firm $45,901,771 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $13,770,531 -> out of $1-10M band; class 500+: 77 firms, avg revenue/firm $274,722,974 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $82,416,892 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 683
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
